reasoning: The control AC-6(3) focuses on ensuring least privilege for network access to privileged commands. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to RBAC configurations to enforce least privilege by ensuring roles and bindings do not grant excessive permissions, particularly avoiding cluster-admin bindings. Additionally, NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict network access to pods that execute privileged commands, ensuring only authorized network paths are allowed.
title: Least Privilege - Least privilege | network access to privileged commands authorize network access
